name: agent-introspection-debugging
tagline: Four-phase self-debugging workflow (capture, diagnose, recover, report) agents follow when stuck in loops or drift.
verdict: Safe, well-structured meta workflow: no network/exec/secret risk, concrete phase templates, a failure-pattern table, and explicit negative triggers pointing to sibling skills. Weak spots are cosmetic: the description states what it does but not when (relies on the body's 'When to Activate'), and there is no version or changelog signal.

highlights.summary: Description states what the skill does but never says when to invoke it; trigger cues only appear in the body's 'When to Activate'.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
